edgeCases: gitleaks absent -> G-Secrets Skip naming the tool; never Fail on absence (toolPresent via exec.LookPath before any scan)
Both scanner families absent -> two Skip results with distinct 'No security scanners available — nothing was verified.' suffix so it is not read as a clean pass
gitleaks non-empty non-JSON / unreadable report -> G-Secrets Warn (parse error), never a false Pass
Vuln tool malformed JSON -> per-tool note folded into G-Vuln Warn ('Dependency audit incomplete'); a clean run with no findings/notes is Pass
Scanner exceeds 120s context timeout -> errScanTimeout -> Warn, validate never wedges
Same CVE from govulncheck and osv-scanner -> de-duped via map[vulnKey]bool keyed on (pkg,id); one sorted Details line
Allowlist entry with '*' or '/' -> filepath.Match path glob; otherwise exact rule-ID equality; unmatched entries are silently ignored
Diff filter active locally -> findings outside filter.Contains dropped (file-scoped like G1/G11); nil filter (CI) -> whole-tree findings retained
Gate enabled=false or absent -> RunWithFilter appends nothing; zero-config projects unaffected (NormalizeSecurityGate no-op, validateSecurityGate no-op when disabled)
